No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1. Ph.D Biomedical Technology 2012 IIT Delhi 2. M.E. CAD/CAM 2000 MNNIT, Allahabad 3. B.E. Rawal, Rahul Ribeiro, Rajesh Malhotra and Naresh Bhatnagar, “Design and Manufacturing of Femoral Stems for the Indian Population. (DOI: 10.3923/pjbs.2013 ) R. Rawal, Rahul Ribeiro, Manoj Chouksey and K. Tripathi, (2013), Biomaterials for cartilage repair: A Review, Journal of Medical Sciences, 14(3):216-223. (DOI: 10.3923/jms.2013 ) Chouksey, K. Tripathi and B. R. Rawal, (2013), Identification of Bearing Stiffness Coefficients using Model Updating, J. Engg. Sc. Mgmt. Ed. Vol-6 (IV): 189-191. Saurabh samadhiya, Amit Yadav, B.R Rawal, (2014), Biomechanical Analysis of Different Knee Prosthesis Biomaterials Using FEM, IOSR-JMCE, 2320- 334X, Volume 11, Issue 3 IV, PP 120-128. Rahul Ribeiro, R. (Presented) B.R.
